CustomField.label: Progress Percentage
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(TEXT(Case_Type__c)), 0, ( (IF(Member_Identified__c, 1, 0) + IF(Complaint_Details_Captured__c, 1, 0) + IF(Intake_Basics_Set__c, 1, 0) + IF(Service_Type_Determined__c, 1, 0) + IF(Late_Filing_Checked__c, 1, 0) + IF(AOR_Validated__c, 1, 0) + IF(Case_Created__c, 1, 0)) / 7 ) * 100 )
